# Pull Request Template

## Summary
- One-line summary of changes.

## Strategic rationale
- 1–2 lines explaining why this change aligns with infrastructure/founder positioning.

## Tone alignment check
- Confirm: No “portfolio” language.
- Confirm: Tone remains declarative, minimal, and precise.

## Plan (required)
- Include the /plan output or a short plan summary listing files changed, rationale, risks, and rollback steps.

## Responsive checklist
- Desktop / 1440px
- Tablet / 1024px
- Mobile / 375px
- Verify headline does not overflow on small screens

## Accessibility check
- Contrast checks completed (pass/fail)
- Headings order verified (h1 first)
- Interactive elements keyboard accessible

## Risk assessment
- Short list of potential risks introduced by this change.

## Rollback plan
- Exact git revert or file(s) to restore if needed.

## Reviewer notes
- Any instructions the reviewer should follow.

## Reference
- Link to AGENTS.md and any relevant issues/plans.
